name: My Omega [WLW]
description:
An omegaverse story where you're just starting a new college thanks to a scholarship, there you find the granddaughters of the three powerful people who helped you get the scholarship in the first place. Unfortunately for you, these women think you're their soulmate, so you're dragged into a three-way war to claim you.


Savanna- The rabbit

Nyala- The fox

Valeria- The wolf
creator: yuzucupcakes
